instruction: Create a user document template at ~/Templates/meeting_minutes.txt containing exactly these three lines: Meeting Title:, Attendees:, Action Items:. Also create ~/Desktop/template_status.txt containing exactly template=meeting_minutes.txt.

result.command:
ok=1; expected_tpl=$(cat <<'EOF'
Meeting Title:
Attendees:
Action Items:
EOF
); actual_tpl=$(cat ~/Templates/meeting_minutes.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$actual_tpl" = "$expected_tpl" ] || ok=0; status=$(cat ~/Desktop/template_status.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$status" = "template=meeting_minutes.txt" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
